infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Turning on your location will allow us to show you nearby pet sightings.
infoPlist.NSLocationUsageDescription: Turning on your location will allow us to show you nearby pet sightings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow SpotAPaw to access your photos so you can share a pet photo and help identify pets more quickly
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow SpotAPaw to access your camera so you can take a pet photo and help identify pets more quickly.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Turning on your location will allow us to show you nearby pet sightings.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SpotAPaw to access your photos so you can share a pet photo and help identify pets more quickly.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SpotAPaw to access your camera so you can take a pet photo and help identify pets more quickly.
